title: Windows shell extension: Office file association handler
description: Replace CollabGate double-open workaround with proper Windows file association handler. CloudMount.exe --open intercepts Office file opens on mounted drive, resolves SharePoint URL, launches ms-word:ofe|u|url.

title: CLI --open handler with path resolution and Office URI launch
Windows file association registration in registry
Improve CollabGate fallback: eliminate error message and double-open
Integration: fix mount() call site and open_file fallback for file associations
description: Two integration fixes needed after parallel workers completed:\n1. WinFspMountHandle::mount() now requires file_associations_registered parameter - call site in main.rs start_mount needs updating\n2. open_file command fallback should use get_previous_handler() from shell_integration to avoid infinite loop when CloudMount is registered as default handler

title: Replace CollabGate with Shell Integration + File Associations Settings
description: Replace the collabGate workaround with proper OS shell integration on Linux/macOS/Windows. Register CloudMount as default handler for Office file types. Add File Associations settings tab with auto-detect and fallback guards. Uses openspec-propose workflow then implementation.

title: Research: Explore collabGate, settings UI, and platform-specific patterns
OpenSpec Propose: Create full specification for shell integration and file associations
description: Use the diff between main and feat/shell-integration to retroactively create OpenSpec artifacts (proposal, design, specs, tasks) documenting the already-implemented shell integration and file associations features. All tasks should reflect completed status.

title: Implementation: Execute tasks from generated OpenSpec proposal
Fix: infinite CMD loop opening Office files outside CloudMount mounts
description: When user double-clicks an Office file outside CloudMount's mounted directory (e.g., Desktop), the --open handler fails to detect it's not a mount file and creates an infinite loop of CMD windows. Must: (1) detect non-mount paths early, (2) forward to original Office handler via saved ProgID, (3) never loop.

title: Diagnose: identify root cause of infinite loop in --open handler
Fix: guard --open handler against non-mount paths + forward to original handler
Shell integration on all platforms (replace CollabGate)
description: Replace the CollabGate blocking mechanism with proper shell integration on Linux and macOS (already done on Windows). When file associations are registered, the OS calls `cloudmount --open <path>` instead of the VFS intercepting the open. Also fix Windows passthrough bug where opening Office files outside CloudMount drives fails.

title: Linux shell integration + shared VFS infrastructure
macOS shell integration
Fix Windows passthrough bug for non-CloudMount files
Tests update + CI check
description: Full CI suite passes. Auto-formatted shell_integration.rs and core_ops.rs. All 5 CI steps green: fmt, clippy (core+desktop), build, test. 237 tests pass including 8 CollabGate tests.

title: Fix open_file infinite loop for external files on Windows
description: When opening an external file (not on a CloudMount drive) with a handled extension (.xlsx etc.), open_file loops infinitely because the env var recursion guard doesn't survive process boundaries. The guard-protected open_with_clean_env approach must be replaced: for handled extensions, use the previous handler directly or error gracefully — never fall through to OS default.

title: Fix open_file fallback logic: prevent infinite loop for handled extensions on all platforms
Previous handler discovery + settings UI for file association fallback
description: When CloudMount can't find a saved previous handler for a handled extension (e.g., .xlsx → Excel), it currently errors. Fix: (1) runtime discovery of Office apps from well-known registry ProgIDs/system lookups, (2) settings UI to view/override handlers per extension, (3) re-detect button to rescan. Sequential: task 1 fixes the immediate bug, task 2 adds UI.

title: Runtime fallback: discover Office apps when no saved previous handler exists
Settings UI: handler overrides per extension + re-detect button
Merge feat/shell-integration and archive OpenSpec change
description: Merge the feat/shell-integration branch into main, then archive the openspec/changes/shell-integration change.

title: Merge feat/shell-integration into main
OpenSpec archive shell-integration change
fix-mountpoint-path-normalization
description: Fix WinFsp STATUS_ACCESS_VIOLATION crash caused by trailing separator in mountpoint paths. Normalize paths to OS-native separators and strip trailing separators at three layers: expand_mount_point(), start_mount_common(), and config creation functions.

title: Normalize expand_mount_point and config creation + tests
description: COMPLETED: Implemented mount point path normalization in cloudmount-core. (1) Added normalize_mountpoint() helper - replaces / with \\ on Windows, strips trailing separators, preserves bare drive roots. (2) Refactored expand_mount_point() to normalize all return paths. (3) Added trim_end_matches to add_sharepoint_mount() and add_onedrive_mount(). (4) Added 7 new tests. All 19 tests pass, clippy clean with RUSTFLAGS=-Dwarnings.

title: Defensive strip in start_mount_common
Verification: make check
Rename CloudMount to Carmine Desktop + Private Server Auto-Update + MSI Installer
description: Full rename of cloud-mount to Carmine Desktop (crates: carminedesktop-*), switch auto-update from GitHub releases to private server (static.carminecapital.com/carmine-desktop/), switch Windows installer from NSIS to WiX/MSI.
